pr.title: AMP-354 | feat: third-party structural review gate + GitHub governance bus v2
pr.body:
## Linear ticket

AMP-354

## What changed

Formalises Ewan's directive: every design and code change gets sent to a removed third party (Perplexity) for structural conformance review before implementation. The reviewer is an indicator node — STRUCTURED opinion, no authority, no responsibility. Also commits the GitHub Governance Bus architecture v2, incorporating Perplexity's structural review of v1.

**New files:**
- `docs/adr/ADR-007-third-party-structural-review.md` — the ADR formalising the gate
- `01_truth/processes/2026-05_third-party-structural-review_sop_v1.md` — the SOP (when to trigger, procedure, context pack, reviewer role)
- `docs/GITHUB_GOVERNANCE_BUS.md` — architecture v2

**Perplexity's 4 additions incorporated into v2:**
1. Gap parking — when a gap is caused by a known precondition failure (API down), park it instead of repeatedly alerting
2. Reconciliation job — hourly GitHub API query to catch missed webhooks
3. Governance export — nightly export to `vellum-record/` for Perplexity pattern recognition
4. Noise reduction — aggregate by process_id, collapse CI checks, suppress Dependabot unless failed

**Perplexity's 4 risk assessments incorporated:**
1. Beast SPOF → dead man's switch (external health check, separate from Beast)
2. Webhook reliability → belt-and-braces + reconciliation
3. Noise overwhelms signal → filtering layer
4. Complexity budget → validate with clear use case before building

## Mode (per AGENTS.md)

- [ ] Act — reversible or contained-impact
- [x] Surface — significant / irreversible, with `DECISION_LOG.md` pointer below
- [ ] Park — stuck, escalation note attached

## Pre-merge checklist

- [x] Signatures present on every committed artefact (`00_authority/SIGNATURES.md`)
- [x] If `00_authority/*` touched: version bumped + changelog entry added
- [x] If new authoritative rule or irreversible commit: `00_authority/DECISION_LOG.md` pointer added
- [x] Every file reference points to a thing that exists (or is marked `[SOURCE REQUIRED]`)
- [x] Examples do not contradict their own rule
- [x] New indexable files (`00_authority/*`, `01_truth/processes/*`, etc.) appear in `00_authority/MANIFEST.md`

## Surface link (only if Mode = Surface)

`00_authority/DECISION_LOG.md` v26 — "Third-Party Structural Review Gate + GitHub Governance Bus v2"

## Notes to reviewer

- This is the first artifact that was itself subject to the third-party structural review process it formalises. Perplexity reviewed the governance bus v1, Devon incorporated the feedback into v2 and formalised the gate.
- ADR-007 is `[DECISION REQUIRED]` — the gate shape needs Ewan's approval before becoming process.
- The governance bus is design only — no code changes to Vellum yet. Implementation is phased (4 sessions).
- Process templates are proposed as authority files — changes would require Five Rods review (per Perplexity's recommendation).

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/bfbc7fe01e7c43dda8cbbb7f9d4a73ec
Requested by: @ewan-dot
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
